description: Negative fixture cases for the support-class ledger gate. Each case is a complete ledger that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_support_class_ledger.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id. These cases keep the downgrade-automation rejections honest even if the canonical ledger changes shape.

cases.summary: A Certified entry references an archetype id that is not in the certified-archetype manifest.
An entry whose ledger state forces narrowing still publishes its claimed class instead of narrowing below it.
